title: Need to update to newest `gvisor-vsock-tap` to fix DNS TXT record issue
body:
### Issue Description

TXT records are being concatenated incorrectly.

https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/issues/562
gvisor-vsock-tap already has a fix for this problem, but podman needs to upgrade to include the fix.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman run -ti debian:stable-slim
2. apt update -y ; apt install dnsutils -y
3. dig TXT bootstrap-v1.veilid.net

### Describe the results you received

output is this:
```
bootstrap-v1.veilid.net. 0	IN	TXT	"1|0|VLD0:m5OY1uhPTq2VWhpYJASmzATsKTC7eZBQmyNs6tRJMmA|bootstrap-1.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws|1746491951|VLD0:t4cMlycXaADCYsipO3_OCw5YLZ2tW_UhL3-CFS_tV8N8d0l1ILenQfzLN-IC9lL_HUkJwsgqq-hAUAgg2XfOBw" "0|0|VLD0:6-FfH7TPb70U-JntwjHS7XqTCMK0lhVqPQ17dJuwlBM|bootstrap-2.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws" "0|0|VLD0:m5OY1uhPTq2VWhpYJASmzATsKTC7eZBQmyNs6tRJMmA|bootstrap-1.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws" "1|0|VLD0:6-FfH7TPb70U-JntwjHS7XqTCMK0lhVqPQ17dJuwlBM|bootstrap-2.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws|1746492253|VLD0:NntMU4LfAVlOVXWh9zjGCnwPDPFnTBPI0q2KuYd0-zO5WvVG7YvQu1h_MdetcjM09zdvEUxJIIU-SaJAWgF1BQ"
```

### Describe the results you expected

when it should be this:
```
;; ANSWER SECTION:
bootstrap-v1.veilid.net. 102	IN	TXT	"0|0|VLD0:6-FfH7TPb70U-JntwjHS7XqTCMK0lhVqPQ17dJuwlBM|bootstrap-2.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws"
bootstrap-v1.veilid.net. 102	IN	TXT	"1|0|VLD0:6-FfH7TPb70U-JntwjHS7XqTCMK0lhVqPQ17dJuwlBM|bootstrap-2.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws|1746492253|VLD0:NntMU4LfAVlOVXWh9zjGCnwPDPFnTBPI0q2KuYd0-zO5WvVG7YvQu1h_MdetcjM09zdvEUxJIIU-SaJAWgF1BQ"
bootstrap-v1.veilid.net. 102	IN	TXT	"0|0|VLD0:m5OY1uhPTq2VWhpYJASmzATsKTC7eZBQmyNs6tRJMmA|bootstrap-1.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws"
bootstrap-v1.veilid.net. 102	IN	TXT	"1|0|VLD0:m5OY1uhPTq2VWhpYJASmzATsKTC7eZBQmyNs6tRJMmA|bootstrap-1.veilid.net|T5150,U5150,W5150/ws|1746491951|VLD0:t4cMlycXaADCYsipO3_OCw5YLZ2tW_UhL3-CFS_tV8N8d0l1ILenQfzLN-IC9lL_HUkJwsgqq-hAUAgg2XfOBw"
```
